channel.title: notes on kxsh

item.title: Tracksmith: The Year of the Amateur
item.description: Ref: YouTube - The Year of the Amatuer I admire most of the films from Tracksmith on their YouTube channel. And this one goes right up there. Because the act of devotion reveals a path to fulfillment we can’t find anywhere else. What a beautiful way to express the potential running holds for some of us. In running, we are all amatuers.
